mapper.sql: tc.test_case_id, tc.business_unit, tc.major_category, tc.middle_category, tc.minor_category, tc.test_case_name, tc.test_content, tc.input_data, tc.expected_result, tc.developer_id, du.user_name AS developer_name, tc.tester_id, tu.user_name AS tester_name, tc.is_test_available, tc.test_status, sc.code_name AS test_status_name, tc.test_result, tc.completed_date, tc.is_retest_requested, tc.remark, tc.created_id, tc.created_at, tc.updated_id, tc.updated_at, bu_c.code_name AS business_unit_name, maj_c.code_name AS major_category_name, mid_c.code_name AS middle_category_name, min_c.code_name AS minor_category_name

LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE bu_c ON bu_c.code_value = tc.business_unit AND bu_c.deleted_at IS NULL AND bu_c.code_group_id = (SELECT code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE group_code = 'BUSINESS_CATEGORY' AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1) LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE maj_c ON maj_c.code_value = tc.major_category AND maj_c.deleted_at IS NULL AND maj_c.code_group_id = (SELECT code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE group_code = tc.business_unit || '_MAJOR' AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1) LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE mid_c ON mid_c.code_value = tc.middle_category AND mid_c.deleted_at IS NULL AND mid_c.code_group_id = (SELECT g.code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP g WHERE g.business_unit = tc.business_unit AND g.category_level = 'MIDDLE' AND g.parent_code_value = tc.major_category AND g.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1) LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE min_c ON min_c.code_value = tc.minor_category AND min_c.deleted_at IS NULL AND min_c.code_group_id = (SELECT g.code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP g WHERE g.business_unit = tc.business_unit AND g.category_level = 'MINOR' AND g.parent_code_value = tc.middle_category AND g.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1)
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE tc LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_USER du ON du.user_id = tc.developer_id LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_USER tu ON tu.user_id = tc.tester_id LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE sc ON sc.code_value = tc.test_status AND sc.code_group_id = (SELECT code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE group_code = 'TEST_STATUS' AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY tc.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT FROM TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE tc LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_USER du ON du.user_id = tc.developer_id LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_USER tu ON tu.user_id = tc.tester_id LEFT JOIN TB_HKTMS_CODE sc ON sc.code_value = tc.test_status AND sc.code_group_id = (SELECT code_group_id FROM TB_HKTMS_CODE_GROUP WHERE group_code = 'TEST_STATUS' AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1)
WHERE tc.test_case_id = #{testCaseId} AND tc.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE (business_unit, major_category, middle_category, minor_category, test_case_name, test_content, input_data, expected_result, developer_id, tester_id, is_test_available, test_status, remark, created_id, created_at) VALUES (#{businessUnit}, #{majorCategory}, #{middleCategory}, #{minorCategory}, #{testCaseName}, #{testContent}, #{inputData}, #{expectedResult}, #{developerId}, #{testerId}, COALESCE(#{isTestAvailable}, TRUE), COALESCE(#{testStatus}, 'READY'), #{remark}, #{createdId}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE SET business_unit = #{businessUnit}, major_category = #{majorCategory}, middle_category = #{middleCategory}, minor_category = #{minorCategory}, test_case_name = #{testCaseName}, test_content = #{testContent}, input_data = #{inputData}, expected_result = #{expectedResult}, developer_id = #{developerId}, tester_id = #{testerId}, is_test_available = #{isTestAvailable}, remark = #{remark}, updated_id = #{updatedId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE test_case_id = #{testCaseId}

UPDATE TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE SET test_status = #{testStatus}, test_result = #{testResult}, completed_date = NOW()#{completedDate}, is_retest_requested = #{isRetestRequested}, updated_id = #{updatedId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE test_case_id = #{testCaseId}
UPDATE TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE SET deleted_id = #{deletedId}, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE test_case_id = #{testCaseId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_HKTMS_TEST_CASE (business_unit, major_category, middle_category, minor_category, test_case_name, test_content, developer_id, tester_id, is_test_available, test_status, remark, created_id, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.businessUnit}, #{item.majorCategory}, #{item.middleCategory}, #{item.minorCategory}, #{item.testCaseName}, #{item.testContent}, #{item.developerId}, #{item.testerId}, COALESCE(#{item.isTestAvailable}, TRUE), COALESCE(#{item.testStatus}, 'READY'), #{item.remark}, #{item.createdId}, NOW())
